## Goal 2: For each author identified in Goal 1, find the title of their very first authored publication (chronologically earliest) and the year of that publication.
- Path 2.1 (for each author sequentially): Search DBLP for the author’s full publication record, sort by year ascending, pick the first entry, and extract its title and year.
